summary: Plan-mode PR inventory shard. No GitHub mutations planned. Classified each listed PR independently using the provided preflight artifact; close/merge/fix actions are blocked by job permissions or insufficient proof. Routed only items with explicit security-sensitive subject matter to central security handling.
